samples.text: A person drinks water because they are thirsty. Is this expected based on common sense?
Someone consumes water because of thirst. Does this match everyday common sense?
An individual drinks H2O because they feel thirsty. Is this expected based on common sense?
Thirst leads people to drink water. A person was thirsty and drank water. Is the described situation expected based on common sense?
A person drinks water because they are thirsty. The room temperature is 22 degrees Celsius. Is this expected based on common sense?
